title: About Rei 1 Yui Naoko and soul divisibility
display_title: About Rei 1 Yui Naoko and soul divisibility
wikitext:
[]: About Rei 1, Yui, Naoko and soul divisibility...             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Tue Mar 08, 2011 1:32 am So, I came up with this theory. You see, there's some division when it comes to decide if Rei 1 was harrassing Naoko Akagi; just being impolite/unacertive or if she was sent by Gendo... Well, I think Yui did it! [sort of] We all know that Rei is to some point part of Yui. What if Yui made Rei in the very first place? If she was created by her around the time Shinji was born, then Rei is effectively 14 years old. Why, you ask? Gendo wanted a son called Shinji and a girl called Rei, why not give to Gendo a daughter before she fused with Eva 01? She knew she was more than likely going to "remain" in Eva 01, maybe she even knew about soul divition... A part of herself could have remained in the Eva and another one in Rei, with a part of Lilith's soul... This leads us to the next part: Naoko said that there are "aspects" in a person (mother, woman, scientist, etc.)... We all know that Asuka's "mother part" went into Eva 02... Could it be that Yui's "woman part" was in Rei 1? If that one is the case, them somehow, Rei 1 would have been subconciusly jealous of Gendo doing Naoko... Could it be that Rei went to say "get away from my husband, you old hag"? Then Rei 1 is killed, Gendo places the whole of Yui in Eva 01, ready to sichro with Shinji, leaving Rei 2 only phisically like Yui... < She could have even left her "woman part" there on purpouse just to see how long it would take Gendo to end the mourning... A lot of this is in the realm of speculation, but what do you think?

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Tue Mar 08, 2011 6:00 am Where's the evidence? Oh... and what do you think of Fuyutsuki's line in ep. 23: "Rei... she is the product of my despair"?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Mar 08, 2011 10:11 am This is all very far fetched... So far, there has been nothing to suggest that Yui's soul was ever divided. She vanished completely, from one day to the other - Plus, Rei is the key to the apocalypse Yui wanted to prevent. If this had happened, there would at least have been some hints. Rei I just did what many young children do and carelessly repeated something she heard an authority figure say, assuming it to be an absolute truth. She even slightly narrows her eyes in confusion when Naoko complains about being called 'old hag', as if little Rei had actually thought that 'old hag' was something like Naoko's name.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei Makes You Go Splat » Tue Mar 08, 2011 6:09 pm I'll admit it, I thought that Yui was really just exacting revenge on Naoko when I first saw that scene. It does put an interesting spin on it even though there's no real evidence for it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 08, 2011 6:14 pm Kendrix wrote: She even slightly narrows her eyes in confusion when Naoko complains about being called 'old hag', as if little Rei had actually thought that 'old hag' was something like Naoko's name.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Wed Mar 09, 2011 12:09 am Well, that was kind of the point, hahaha... No evidence... Then again, almost everything duscussed in forums is speculation... But hey, wouldn't it be interesting? Yui giving Gendo a daughter before leaving? A daughter that would in fact, be a living reminder of herself? I dunno you, but I have always thougth that Rei 1 was poking on Naoko on purpouse... The idea of Yui's soul divided isn't that wacky... Despite 2 souls could coexist in a body, we have no evidence of Rei 1 already being the vessel for [at least a part] of Lilith's soul...

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Wed Mar 09, 2011 10:08 am arael wrote: Then again, almost everything duscussed in forums is speculation...

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Mar 09, 2011 12:49 pm Reichu wrote: She narrows her eyes when she says "anata no koto", = "(about) you". "'Old hag' is what the chief is calling you." The face Rei makes looks less like "confusion" and more like an impish grin. (Of course, I should be checking the episode before posting this, but ... whatever.)

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Mar 09, 2011 4:03 pm I don't buy the idea that Yui's soul is in Rei 1, but I wonder if there's any hint of Yui left in the LCL/DNA. I actually think the theory is somewhat probable, at least in regards to the idea that there's just enough of Yui in Rei 1 to be jealous of Ritsuko. I get the idea that kids repeat what they hear from parents, but I think they're less inclined to insult strangers like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Mar 09, 2011 5:51 pm It's not hugely clear to me that Rei is consciously insulting Naoko. She seems to be parroting Gendou without any concept of the fact that Naoko might be displeased by hearing what she has to say. Also, the scene is shot from Naoko's point of view and makes it quite clear that the woman is unsettled even without Rei to weird her out; given that obvious bias, I'd be wary of ascribing any malice to Rei I.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Wed Mar 09, 2011 9:13 pm Azathoth wrote: It's not hugely clear to me that Rei is consciously insulting Naoko. She seems to be parroting Gendou without any concept of the fact that Naoko might be displeased by hearing what she has to say.
